Templates

Live, clickable previews of every template you can start from in the QuickSite Chrome extension. Each one is a plain static HTML page — Tailwind CDN, dark-mode ready, zero runtime dependencies.

Landing page

A SaaS/product landing page with features, testimonials, and pricing.

emerald

A personal portfolio for designers, developers, and other makers.

amber
